details.reasoning: Complete and correct implementation of `uv cache stats` subcommand. All rubric requirements met: (1) Stats(StatsArgs) variant added to CacheCommand enum with human bool flag, (2) cache_stats function properly iterates CacheBucket::iter() and uses DiskUsage for computation, returns ExitStatus::Success, (3) --human flag implemented with human_readable_bytes formatting, (4) output includes per-bucket lines and total, (5) module registration complete in mod.rs with proper pub(crate) use, (6) dispatch wiring in lib.rs correctly matches CacheCommand::Stats, (7) follows cache_size patterns. Additional strengths: display_name() method added to CacheBucket for readable labels, test helpers properly added (with_filtered_cache_stats, cache_stats command builder), comprehensive tests covering empty cache/with packages/human format, proper preview feature warning consistent with cache_size, tests properly registered with feature gates. No significant issues identified.
